quote: Taking a class with Veronica is like a breath of fresh air, a warm hug, and a huge helping of your favorite dessert—all at once.
author: Stef C.

quote: I have been on my Yoga Therapy journey with Veronica a little over 2 years now. She has taught me how to lead my life with love and an open heart.
author: Jessi G.

quote: Soulhood Circle has been my monthly shining light since it started in December 2021. I always feel so empowered and heard.
author: Maggie R.

quote: I went through some yoga therapy sessions with Veronica. She helped me come to terms with my rheumatoid arthritis diagnosis, both physically and emotionally.
author: Deanna B.

quote: Veronica is a yoga instructor extraordinaire who skillfully delivers yoga philosophy, asanas, flows, affirmations and positive, playful energy several times a week.
author: Elizabeth M.

quote: Veronica has a talent for making yoga therapy fun and accessible. Through working with her, I have been able to move through my personal blocks and obstacles.
author: Kristy L.

quote: Soulhood got me through one of the most isolating times of my life. I lived on my own for the first time, in the middle of the pandemic.
author: Jessi G.

quote: I enjoy my yoga therapy sessions every time, always tailored to my current mood and what is showing up that particular session.
author: Pam B.

quote: Thank you Veronica, for being such a creative, thoughtful, energetic, spiritual, and dedicated teacher! Your love and passion shine through as you teach from your heart.
author: Lyn H.

quote: My wonderful daughter recently gifted me Veronica's videos. They have been an amazing way to rekindle and learn about Yoga. I am 71 years young and loving it.
author: Deb M.
